commandsRun.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, urllib.request
url='https://blockscout-testnet.polkadot.io/api/v2/transactions/0xea5ecc4be7c66ef062414ffd80f322727f48475749b6f141fa67226a6cbdc9cd'
with urllib.request.urlopen(url, timeout=30) as resp:
    print(resp.status)
PY
commandsRun.observation: Blockscout API request returned HTTP 403 from this environment, so explorer API was not used as the primary verifier.

Computed executeLocalXcm selector 0x6ffac710, sendCrossChainNotification selector 0x7d1d810f, XcmExecuted topic 0x28acd9413969d099b5b8d549f643f41d7cac14bb7f22a1bb9277525a04858108, and XcmSent topic 0x3236823f7f04a8d92d51554651ba742e0bbe7e7ec538132a2eeab0e4919fdad1.

commandsRun.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, subprocess
rpc='https://services.polkadothub-rpc.com/testnet/'
payload=json.dumps([{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":"tx-execute","method":"eth_getTransactionByHash","params":["0xea5ecc4be7c66ef062414ffd80f322727f48475749b6f141fa67226a6cbdc9cd"]},{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":"rcpt-execute","method":"eth_getTransactionReceipt","params":["0xea5ecc4be7c66ef062414ffd80f322727f48475749b6f141fa67226a6cbdc9cd"]},{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":"tx-send","method":"eth_getTransactionByHash","params":["0x26d74cf7b7a73aa0dce1b0314129338fabd6d9b94391387d431ab53a32bf5468"]},{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":"rcpt-send","method":"eth_getTransactionReceipt","params":["0x26d74cf7b7a73aa0dce1b0314129338fabd6d9b94391387d431ab53a32bf5468"]}])
out=subprocess.check_output(['curl','-sS','-H','Content-Type: application/json','--data',payload,rpc], text=True)
print(out)
PY
commandsRun.observation: Fallback RPC returned both tx objects and receipts: execute receipt status=0x1 at block 0x637710 and send receipt status=0x1 at block 0x637711, each with the expected contract address and event topic.

frictions.description: Primary read surfaces blocked scripted access from this environment: Blockscout /api/v2/transactions/... and the primary ETH RPC both returned HTTP 403 during validation.
frictions.resolution: Used the documented fallback RPC https://services.polkadothub-rpc.com/testnet/ for one sparse batched eth_getTransactionByHash/eth_getTransactionReceipt query.
